title: Rocketman Is Found
description: Robin, Franky, and CP9 board the Sea Train, while the Straw Hats and allies scramble to follow them.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Franky, Luffy, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Robin, Franky, and CP9 board the Sea Train, while the Straw Hats and allies scramble to follow them.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Spandam's face is all messed up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You have Permis- Soon to shoot!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He's carrying some kind of weapon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Run him over!! I don't care!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: You don't have to think about it!

summary: Robin, Franky, and CP9 board the Sea Train, while the Straw Hats and allies scramble to follow them.
